enrichment.note: Official actuals pulled where keys/network allowed; forecasts merged from provider consensus (FMP/Finnhub) or labelled historical proxy. Missing values stay null (never fabricated).

surprise.macro_interpretation: CPI YoY (May) was close to consensus, so cross-asset interpretation depends more on revisions, composition, and prior positioning than the headline difference alone.

Proxy-based read (prior print used as baseline, NOT consensus): CPI MoM (May) missed the policy-sensitive consensus in a direction that could ease rate pressure; confirmation requires lower yields and broader risk participation rather than an isolated equity reaction.

Retail Sales MoM (May) exceeded the policy-sensitive consensus in a direction that could reinforce a more restrictive rate path; confirmation requires higher yields and a firmer dollar rather than the surprise alone.
